basic_details.job_title: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Project Research Scientist I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology (ISM) Dhanbad (IIT (ISM) Dhanbad) has published the Project Research Scientist I (Non-medical) Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Project Research Scientist I (Non-medical) position on a contractual basis. Candidates up to 35 years of age holding a First-Class M.Tech./ M.E./ M.Sc./ M.S. in Mechanical Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Mathematics, Mathematics and Computing, or Applied Mathematics with strong fundamentals in CFD, FEA, and medical image processing are eligible to apply through email on or before 22 July 2026. Candidates can e

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: For SC/ ST/ OBC and women candidates as per GoI.

qualification.education_qualification: First-Class M.Tech./ M.E./ MSc./ MS in Mechanical Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Mathematics/Mathematics and Computing/Applied Mathematics with strong fundamentals in CFD, FEA, and medical image processing
qualification.details: A First-Class M.Tech./ M.E./ MSc./ MS in Mechanical Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Mathematics/ Mathematics and Computing/ Applied Mathematics with strong fundamentals in Computational fluid dynamics (CFD), finite element analysis (FEA), and medical image processing.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_ism_dhanb: First-Class M.Tech./ M.E./ MSc./ MS in Mechanical Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Mathematics/Mathematics and Computing/Applied Mathematics with strong fundamentals in CFD, FEA, and medical image processing

content_sections.heading: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Project Research Scientist I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Project Research Scientist I (Non-medical) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Project Research Scientist I Vacancy 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: A First-Class M.Tech./ M.E./ MSc./ MS in Mechanical Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Mathematics/ Mathematics and Computing/ Applied Mathematics with strong fundamentals in Computational fluid dynamics (CFD), finite element analysis (FEA), and medical image processing.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: For SC/ ST/ OBC and women candidates as per GoI.

content_sections.heading: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Project Research Scientist I Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Project Research Scientist I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Project Research Scientist-I (Non-medical) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the Project Research Scientist-I (Non-medical) position at IIT (ISM) Dhanbad is 22nd July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a First-Class M.Tech./M.E./MSc./MS in Mechanical Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Mathematics/Mathematics and Computing/Applied Mathematics with strong fundamentals in CFD, FEA, and medical image processing.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Research Scientist-I (Non-medical) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC and women candidates as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their merit, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Research Scientist-I (Non-medical) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 56,000 per month, plus 20% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. How many vacancies are available for the Project Research Scientist-I (Non-medical) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Research Scientist-I (Non-medical) position at IIT (ISM) Dhanbad.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Project Research Scientist-I (Non-medical) is a contractual role.

faq.question: Q10. Where is IIT (ISM) Dhanbad located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology (ISM) Dhanbad is located in Dhanbad, Jharkhand.
